articles.title: Court rules 13 men who allegedly helped rapist drug and abuse wife can be named
articles.description: 13 men are accused of helping a man abuse his wife over a period of years.

articles.title: Watch: Moment woman pulled from rubble alive
articles.description: First responders and volunteers pulled a survivor from under the rubble of a collapsed building in La Guaira.

articles.title: Man who punched female police officers at Manchester Airport jailed
articles.description: Mohammed Fahir Amaaz assaulted PC Lydia Ward, PC Ellie Cook and a Starbucks customer, a court heard.

articles.title: How transparent are the royals being about money?
articles.description: After the King reveals the tax he paid questions remain over how open the Royal Family is being about its wealth.
